plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the survey form structure changed, but the automation was using cached selectors from a previous version of the page.
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode was active (using cached selectors)
The failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' while the failed tool call was looking for 'Last Name'
High flakiness score (0.89) with alternating success/failure patterns in history
Overall objective is semantically flexible ('Fill out all questions')

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Donobu/page.ai cache for this test and re-run. This will force the agent to re-analyze the page and identify the new 'Your Name' field instead of looking for the old 'Last Name' selector.

remediationSteps.summary: Investigate potential A/B testing or dynamic form generation.
remediationSteps.details: If the failure persists after clearing the cache, verify if the website is performing A/B testing on the form fields. Consider updating the AI instruction to be even more generic if specific field names are causing confusion.

plan.notes: Visual comparison between the failure screenshot and the tool parameters confirms a UI change: the automation attempted to fill a 'Last Name' field, but the current UI shows a single 'Your Name' field instead. Since the page.ai instruction is semantically flexible ('Fill out all survey questions'), clearing the cache will allow the AI to adapt to the new form layout.
